---
title: "NPE KnowledgeBase"
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# NPE KnowledgeBase
:::

A private study hub for NPE preparation and clinical practice resources.

::: jump-nav
[Overview](#overview){.jump-link}
[Access flow](#access-flow){.jump-link}
[Request access](#request-access){.jump-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Overview {#overview}

::: role-section
::: role-block
[Public website (Quarto)]{.role-title}
[Used as the front door: what the hub is, who it is for, and how to request access.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
[Private hub (Apps Script)]{.role-title}
[Used for actual resources, sessions, and uploads. Access is checked server-side against Approved Users.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
[Private files (Google Drive)]{.role-title}
[Uploads stay in a private Drive folder and are not stored in the public Git repository.]{.role-desc}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Access flow {#access-flow}

1. Submit a request from this page.
2. The request is reviewed manually.
3. Your email is added to Approved Users.
4. You sign in with that same Google account to enter the private hub.

::: about-section
[Open private hub →](https://script.google.com/){.about-link}
[Back to Clinical resources →](../clinical/resources.qmd){.about-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Request access {#request-access}

```{=html}
<style>
.npe-form-wrap {
  max-width: 640px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  background: var(--bg-card);
  padding: 1rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.npe-form {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.8rem;
}
.npe-field {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.25rem;
}
.npe-label {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy);
}
.npe-input,
.npe-textarea {
  width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  color: var(--text);
  padding: 0.55rem 0.7rem;
  font: inherit;
  outline: none;
}
.npe-input:focus,
.npe-textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--navy);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(30, 58, 42, 0.08);
}
.npe-textarea {
  min-height: 110px;
  resize: vertical;
}
.npe-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 0.1rem;
}
.npe-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border: 2px solid var(--navy);
  cursor: pointer;
}
.npe-btn-primary {
  background: var(--navy);
  color: #fff;
}
.npe-btn-secondary {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--navy);
}
.npe-status {
  display: none;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 0.8rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}
.npe-status.ok {
  display: block;
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #166534;
}
.npe-status.fail {
  display: block;
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #991b1b;
}
</style>

<div class="npe-form-wrap">
  <form id="npe-access-form" class="npe-form" onsubmit="return submitAccessRequest(event)">
    <input type="hidden" name="access_key" value="03b4348e-774c-4e7b-9300-f9f602cecc75">
    <input type="hidden" name="subject" value="NPE KnowledgeBase access request — connorconkeymorrison.com">

    <div class="npe-field">
      <label class="npe-label" for="npe-name">Name</label>
      <input class="npe-input" id="npe-name" name="name" type="text" required>
    </div>

    <div class="npe-field">
      <label class="npe-label" for="npe-email">Email</label>
      <input class="npe-input" id="npe-email" name="email" type="email" required>
    </div>

    <div class="npe-field">
      <label class="npe-label" for="npe-message">Reason for access</label>
      <textarea class="npe-textarea" id="npe-message" name="message" required></textarea>
    </div>

    <div class="npe-actions">
      <button type="submit" class="npe-btn npe-btn-primary" id="npe-submit">Request access</button>
      <a class="npe-btn npe-btn-secondary" href="mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com?subject=NPE%20KnowledgeBase%20access%20request">Email instead</a>
    </div>

    <p id="npe-status" class="npe-status"></p>
  </form>
</div>

<script>
async function submitAccessRequest(event) {
  event.preventDefault();

  const form = document.getElementById('npe-access-form');
  const status = document.getElementById('npe-status');
  const submit = document.getElementById('npe-submit');

  status.className = 'npe-status';
  status.textContent = '';
  submit.disabled = true;
  submit.textContent = 'Sending...';

  try {
    const response = await fetch('https://api.web3forms.com/submit', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: new FormData(form)
    });
    const result = await response.json();

    if (!result.success) throw new Error(result.message || 'Submission failed');

    status.className = 'npe-status ok';
    status.textContent = 'Request sent. You will be reviewed before approval.';
    form.reset();
  } catch (error) {
    status.className = 'npe-status fail';
    status.textContent = 'Request failed. Please try again or email directly.';
  } finally {
    submit.disabled = false;
    submit.textContent = 'Request access';
  }

  return false;
}
</script>
```
